channel.title: Containers on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Containers on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 6 is now available!
item.description:
The post announces .NET 11 Preview 6 and says it includes updates across runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, F#, and container images. No specific feature details are included in the provided text.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Container Apps Sandboxes
item.description:
Azure Container Apps Sandboxes is in public preview. It is positioned for workloads that need to run untrusted code, retain session state, and absorb bursty demand.

  • Source: Azure Updates
